caption: 💻 Neon lights hum against my skin, the Tokyo summer heat a second heartbeat beneath my bikini. I wasn’t meant for this. Or maybe I was—after all, who else would survive a data-drown in the Underworld's cyber-warmth? My haptic suit flickers, syncing her to the ghost-net as the night’s pulse races through my veins. A shadow steps from the rain-slicked alley. 'Run, girl,' it hisses, cybernetic gears grinding in low-octane groans. Her voice cuts through the static. 'Or taste the data.' A jolt of electricity surges, sending waves rippling across the grid. I dive forward, my neon bikini clinging to muscle and sweat as the ghost-net wraps around us. Hands graze warm chrome, a whisper of lace against circuitry, and suddenly, I'm not running. I'm hunting. The heat rises higher, her breath fanning my neck in that electric summer storm. One pull, one thrust, and I'm in the flow—where reality bleeds into the dream. The city screams, alive, hungry. We ride the waves of chrome and silk, bodies fused, signals syncing, the summer night ours to own. #CyberpunkAdventures #NeonDesires #DigitalRomance #FutureHeat
